title: How to convert BibTeX to CSV (free, in your browser)

segments.voice: Got a BibTeX file from Zotero, Mendeley, or your advisor?
But you need it in a spreadsheet, not a text file.

scene.headline:
Need it as
a spreadsheet
scene.sub: to filter, sort, or hand off to a non-LaTeX user

segments.voice: Convert it to CSV. Opens in Excel, Google Sheets, Numbers, anywhere.

scene.headline: BibTeX to CSV
scene.sub: every entry becomes a row, every field a column

segments.voice: Your library stays on your computer. Nothing uploaded.
Go to twineconvert dot com slash bibtex to csv.
Drop your dot bib file. Click convert. Download your CSV. Done.
Link's in the bio, give it a try!
